deliverables.title: AARNN Product Overview
deliverables.audience: Advanced R&D buyers, autonomy teams, and technical evaluators
deliverables.goal: Explain AARNN as a neuroscience-led intelligence platform grounded in timed signal flow, morphology, and embodied runtime paths.

sections.focus: When a model wrapper is not enough

avoid: marketing language detached from implemented surfaces

deliverables.title: AARNN Training Walkthrough
deliverables.audience: Internal enablement, solution architects, and technical operators
deliverables.goal: Show how to explain, inspect, and navigate AARNN's operator surface and embodiment path.
deliverables.cta: Keep the scientific and operational stories connected
